intervention_inventory.name: Custom Triton GEMM for gate_up_proj
intervention_inventory.technique: Autotuned Triton GEMM kernel with M-matched tiling, shape-gated dispatch for [M, 2560] x [2560, 18432] at M>=8
intervention_inventory.failure_reason: Kernel speedup vanishes under production DRAM-bound conditions; L2-warm speedup (1.05-1.19x) does not translate to E2E

citations.claim: OP-001 selected with status FAILED, reason: kernel speedup vanishes under DRAM-bound conditions
citations.quoted_content: "op001": {"status": "FAILED", "reason": "Kernel speedup vanishes under DRAM-bound conditions"}

citations.claim: OP-001 overall determination is FAIL; numerically correct but does not meet E2E kill criteria
citations.quoted_content:
# Validation Results: OP-001 -- Custom Triton GEMM for gate_up_proj

## Overall Determination: FAIL

The implementation is numerically correct and torch.compile compatible, but does not meet the E2E kill criteria at any target batch size.

citations.claim: E2E results: BS=8 -0.052%, BS=32 +0.066%, both within noise and below kill criteria

intervention_inventory.name: GDN Sub-Chain Fusion
intervention_inventory.technique: Fuse 3-kernel decode sub-chain into single Triton kernel; inline conv1d (4-tap + SiLU), gating, L2norm, and recurrent delta rule
intervention_inventory.failure_reason: Inter-program race condition on shared Q,K conv state forced Python-level scatter workaround; overhead exceeded fusion savings at all batch sizes

citations.claim: OP-002 FAILED: fused kernel slower cold-cache, all BS regressed

citations.claim: Baseline E2E latency: BS=1 6.4935s, BS=8 7.7388s, BS=32 10.2237s with <0.2% stdev

anti_patterns.description: Champion-1 claimed 2.8-3.4% E2E improvement at BS=32 based on isolated cold-cache kernel speedups of 1.085-1.107x. Even after 2x deflation the expected floor was 1.4%, versus measured +0.066% (21x below deflated floor, 40x below raw projection). Root cause: gate_up_proj weight (90 MB) fits in L40S L2 cache (96 MB) in isolation, creating measurement artifact; production 8 GB working set evicts L2 entirely.

citations.claim: Champion-1 projected 3.4% E2E at BS=32 from 1.107x isolated kernel speedup
citations.quoted_content:
**BS=32**:
- f_decode(gate_up_proj) = 35.4% (from bottleneck_analysis.md: ampere_bf16_64x128 at 6097 us / 17226 us)
- kernel_speedup = 1.107x (measured cold-cache, Tier 2)
- E2E = 0.354 x (1 - 1/1.107) = 0.354 x 0.0966 = **3.4%**

citations.claim: Severe Amdahl violation ratio < 0.01; standalone benchmarks measured L2-warm performance not production DRAM-bound
citations.quoted_content: Severe Amdahl violation (ratio < 0.01 at both BS). The kernel speedup measured in standalone benchmarks does not translate to E2E. Root cause: standalone kernel benchmarks measured L2-warm performance

citations.claim: Actual E2E: BS=32 +0.066%, BS=8 -0.052%, both noise-level

op001.root_cause: Both cuBLAS and Triton equally DRAM-bound (~640 GB/s) under production 8 GB working set; L2-warm tiling advantage disappears

citations.claim: OP-001 verdict: FAIL -- 5-19% kernel-level speedup does not translate to E2E; both equally DRAM-bound at ~640 GB/s
citations.quoted_content: **Verdict**: FAIL. The 5--19% kernel-level speedup measured in standalone benchmarks does not translate to end-to-end performance. Under production conditions with the full 8 GB model working set, both cuBLAS and Triton are equally DRAM-bound at ~640 GB/s.

op002.root_cause: GVA architecture (HV=32 > H=16) creates inter-program race on shared Q,K conv state; Triton lacks grid-level barriers; Python scatter workaround overhead exceeds fusion savings

citations.claim: Root cause: inter-program race condition on shared Q,K conv state forced Python-level scatter workaround whose overhead exceeds savings
citations.quoted_content: The regression is caused by the Python-level Q,K conv state update. The implementation was forced to move the Q,K conv state update out of the Triton kernel due to an inter-program race condition...Without a grid-level barrier in Triton (which doesn't exist), there is no way to safely update shared Q,K conv state

implementation_branches.reason_not_merged: E2E kill criteria not met; kernel speedup vanishes under production DRAM-bound conditions
